title: venue-hold-calendar
purpose: Hold venue dates and keep the review queue honest before outreach.
doneWhen: Venue hold list reviewed and owner assigned.
memory: Need owner before this can leave review.

title: source-folder-audit
purpose: Verify source folders before the next set prep session.
doneWhen: All source folders are named and reachable.
memory: Keep this blocked until the source folder exists.

title: lighting-checklist
purpose: Prepare a small checklist for stage lighting setup.
doneWhen: Checklist is ready for the venue handoff.
memory: Button needs to say exactly what setup action runs next.

title: release-flyer-assets
purpose: Collect release flyer files and final export notes.
doneWhen: Final flyer assets are listed and ready to share.
memory: Use the dark variant for the first preview.

title: recording-export
purpose: Export a reference recording for later review.
doneWhen: Recording export exists and is named.
memory: Done item stays visible for audit context.

title: warmup-set-notes
purpose: Keep warmup notes attached to the set planning flow.
doneWhen: Warmup notes are saved for reference.
memory: Good example of a completed note pack.

title: climate-site-brief
purpose: Review site notes and prepare a short field-check brief.
doneWhen: Field-check brief names the source, risk, and button result.
memory: Climate profile should call this a site check in Settings.

title: api-contract-review
purpose: Check the Button-runs-next response contract before the next release.
doneWhen: Contract examples and response fields agree.
memory: Keep Where / Blocker / Button-runs-next fields explicit.

title: owner-cleanup-pass
purpose: Find work that should not be ownerless.
doneWhen: Owner values are assigned or intentionally left blank.
memory: Use the review queue to make owner gaps visible.

title: mobile-current-path-qa
purpose: Check the mobile bottom dock in dark and light themes.
doneWhen: Dock, buttons, badges, and Current path are readable.
memory: Watch for light highlights behind white text in dark mode.

title: github-pages-demo-copy
purpose: Keep the public demo honest about what stays in this browser.
doneWhen: Demo explains static limits and shows the main app surfaces.
memory: Do not imply local saves, memory, or files work on GitHub Pages.

title: make-an-old-fashioned
purpose: Keep a small repeatable checklist for making an Old Fashioned.
doneWhen: Ingredients, glass, garnish, and stirring steps are ready.
memory: Use this as a low-stakes example of a personal pack.

title: calendar-date-pass
purpose: Make sure due-date work exercises calendar and today views.
doneWhen: Today and Calendar routes both show dated work.
memory: Calendar is static here; real scheduling remains local.
